calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds Deposited With Clerk Pursuant To Civ. C. 2924j(C); Claim Of Martha Upshur For Surplus Proceeds From Trustee Sale Deposited With Clerk Of The Court
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES WERE MADE BY THE PARTIES. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. CLAIMANT MARTHA UPSHUR'S Motion For Order Distributing Surplus Funds Deposited With Clerk Pursuant To C.C.P. 2924 j (C) is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
